name: xeno-mini-crm
description: AI-Native Mini CRM with Asynchronous Delivery Channel Simulation

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix crm-backend && npm install --prefix channel-service && npm install --prefix crm-frontend
scripts.dev: npx concurrently "npm run dev --prefix crm-backend" "npm run dev --prefix channel-service" "npm run dev --prefix crm-frontend"
